g.title: deny
g.text: this single check is the primary thing

g.title: tok
g.text: read- or write-scoped; provgate holds a write one

g.title: unm
g.text: bundles that matched no roster entry

g.title: cohort
g.text: virtualized · filter and sort by flag,

g.title: xflags
g.text: students grouped by a shared paste

g.title: none
g.text: most of the cohort ends here

g.title: t2
g.text: every event on a scrubable axis

g.title: jump
g.text: every flag carries a supporting seq —
click it and land on the moment it happened

g.title: t3
g.text: watch the file being written; external changes
are framed in place, then the view returns

g.title: t4
g.text: the 8 checks, with the failing seq

g.title: recomp
g.text: re-runs heuristics against the re-parsed bundles;
